title: Whiten pen solids out of the chalk keep reference
oneline: Gate fix validated: all 19 overridden chalks now pass, zero regressions, regen passes first try
summary: The chalk keep gate scored candidates against the raw pen, so correctly whitening a solid pen pupil read as lost ink — 19 of 94 shipped chalks fail the current gate and were hand-shipped. A ~10-line patch builds the keep reference via whitenSolidRegions (existing lib/solid-regions.mjs machinery, same exemption the outline normalizer grants): all 19 jump from 49.7-79.2% worst-tile to 88.7-97.5% and pass, while the 29 solid-free pages move at most 0.64pp. A live regen of shapes/circle-tall with the fixed gate passed every gate on the first Gemini attempt.
tried: Full-catalog offline re-score of all 94 shipped chalks: outlineMatch against raw pen vs solid-whitened pen reference
Implemented the fix in gen-coloring-chalk.mjs (scoreSolidity + whitenSolidRegions build the keep reference; other gates still use the raw pen)
Verified through the real tool's --rescore path on the 19 failing pages plus 2 clean controls
Live regen of shapes/circle-tall (worst page, 49.7%) with the fixed gate active (1 Gemini call)
worked: All 19 gate-blocked shipped chalks flip to PASS (worst tile 49.7-79.2% -> 88.7-97.5%); audit's >=80% criterion met
Zero pass->fail regressions across the catalog; solid-free pages change <=0.64pp (bee-tall's 4e-5pp 'drop' is PNG re-encode noise)
Real-tool --rescore run prints clean lines, exits 0; warn-only eye notes on controls preserved
Fresh circle-tall chalk passed every gate on Gemini attempt 1 (localKeep 90.8%) — --apply would ship with zero manual steps
limitations: AUDIT.md's 13-override count is an undercount: 19 shipped chalks fail today's gate (extras sat at exactly the 80% bar or shipped earlier); same root cause
flower-tall (91.5%) and circle-tall (88.7%) remain lowest — thin residual red rings where the chalk pupil outline sits slightly inside the pen blob rim
Does not implement the audit's fallback --apply-reviewed flag (likely unnecessary now)
Rim width SOLID_RIM_WIDTH=6 shared with the normalizer; untuned, but no page needed tuning
